class.name: FtgPackage
class.summary: Loader for FTG archives (Dark Reign game format)
class.details: Reads FTG archives as used by the Dark Reign game. The FTG format stores files in a flat directory with 28-byte filenames, uncompressed data at fixed offsets. When a .ftg bundle is loaded via FS_LoadBundle, every .spr sprite file found in the archive is automatically parsed and added to the project as a SpriteAnimation child object. Each .spr file is a pure animation descriptor: it embeds a reference to a .spt palette-indexed texture atlas (loaded from the same archive) and a table of per-frame pixel coordinates within that atlas. UV rectangles are computed by dividing the pixel coords by the atlas dimensions. The palette is currently ignored and the raw indices are uploaded as a single-channel GL_RED texture. Successfully loaded SpriteAnimation objects are named after the .spr file (without extension) and can be looked up via OBJ_FindChild and assigned to SKSpriteNode.Animation.
